HSSTT.title: Remaining Useful Life Prediction and Uncertainty Quantification of Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Under Variable Load
HSSTT.author: Bressel, Mathieu and Hilairet, Mickaël and Hissel, Daniel and Ould Bouamama, Belkacem
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Bressel et al. propose an extended Kalman filter-based algorithm integrated with the inverse first-order reliability method for SOH and RUL prediction, along with the corresponding confidence intervals.

HSSTT.title: A Novel Prognostics Approach Using Shifting Kernel Particle Filter of Li-Ion Batteries Under State Changes
HSSTT.author: Kim, Seokgoo and Park, Hyung Jun and Choi, Joo-Ho and Kwon, Daeil
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Kim et al. propose a prognostic model utilizing a dynamic particle filter which quantifies the uncertainty associated with the battery's end-of-life and adaptively adjusts the parameters of the degradation model.

HSSTT.title: Sparse Kernel Ridge Regression Assisted Particle Filter Based Remaining Useful Life Estimation of Cascode GaN FET
HSSTT.author: Haque, Moinul Shahidul and Choi, Seungdeog
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Haque and Choi propose a prognostic model utilizing a sparse kernel ridge regression-assisted particle filter and quantifie abrupt changes in degradation trajectories by accounting for noise uncertainty.

HSSTT.title: An enhanced particle filter technology for battery system state estimation and RUL prediction
HSSTT.author: Mohamed Ahwiadi and Wilson Wang
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Ahwiadi and Wang propose an enhanced particle filter model based on evolutionary fuzzy predictors to mitigate sample degeneracy and impoverishment issues while achieving high-precision remaining useful life interval estimation.

HSSTT.title: A fuzzy robust two-stage unscented Kalman filter method for uncertainty and state of charge estimation of lithium-ion batteries
HSSTT.author: Omid Rezaei and Ali Rahdan and Sohrab Sardari and Masoud Dahmardeh and Zhanle Wang
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Rezaei et al. develope a fuzzy robust two-stage unscented Kalman filter to estimate cycle capacity and quantify uncertainty in a phased manner using the noise covariance matrix.

HSSTT.title: A Novel Robust Dual Unscented Particle Filter Method for Remaining Useful Life Prediction of Rolling Bearings
HSSTT.author: Cui, Lingli and Li, Wenjie and Liu, Dongdong and Wang, Huaqing
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Cui et al. design a prognostic model based on dual unscented particle filters to address uncertainties in dynamic degradation trajectories and achieve robust prediction.

HSSTT.title: Online Capacity Prediction of Lithium-Ion Batteries Based on Physics-Constrained Zonotopic Kalman Filter
HSSTT.author: Wang, Zhenhua and Zhao, Zhenwen and Zhou, Meng and Wang, Jing and Shen, Yi
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Wang et al. propose a zonotopic Kalman filter-based method with physics constraints to achieve online capacity interval estimation.

HSSTT.title: Multivariate relevance vector regression based degradation modeling and remaining useful life prediction
HSSTT.author: Wang, Xiuli and Jiang, Bin and Wu, Shaomin and Lu, Ningyun and Ding, Steven X.
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Wang et al. introduce a prognostic method based on relevance vector regression (RVR).

HSSTT.title: Gaussian process regression for in situ capacity estimation of lithium-ion batteries
HSSTT.author: Richardson, Robert R. and Birkl, Christoph R. and Osborne, Michael A. and Howey, David A.
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Richardson et al. employ Gaussian process regression (GPR) for SOH estimation.

HSSTT.title: A Bayesian mixture neural network for remaining useful life prediction of lithium-ion batteries
HSSTT.author: Zhang, Shuxin and Liu, Zhitao and Su, Hongye
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Zhang et al. develop a Bayesian mixture neural network (BMNN) to capture the distribution of prediction results.

HSSTT.title: Sensor-aware CapsNet: Towards trustworthy multisensory fusion for remaining useful life prediction
HSSTT.author: Li, Dongpeng and Chen, Jiaxian and Huang, Ruyi and Chen, Zhuyun and Li, Weihua
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Li et al. propose a dropout-based remaining useful life (RUL) prediction framework named SACN.

HSSTT.title: State of health estimation for lithium-ion batteries under arbitrary usage using data-driven multimodel fusion
HSSTT.author: Zhang, Yizhou and Wik, Torsten and Bergström, John and Zou, Changfu
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Zhang et al. combine a multi-model fusion method and a deep ensemble neural network to quantify SOH estimation uncertainty, known as DeNN.

HSSTT.title: Automatic Feature Extraction-Enabled Lithium-Ion Battery Capacity Estimation Using Random Fragmented Charging Data
HSSTT.author: Zhou, Ziyou and Liu, Yonggang and Zhao, Zhigang and Xia, Huan and Chen, Zheng and Zhang, Yuanjian
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Zhou et al. design a Bayesian deep autoencoder (BDAE) with Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) and variational inference to measure the uncertainty in SOH estimates.

HSSTT.title: Uncertainty quantification in machine learning for engineering design and health prognostics: A tutorial
HSSTT.author: Nemani, Venkat and Biggio, Luca and Huan, Xun and Hu, Zhen and Fink, Olga and Tran, Anh and Wang, Yan and Zhang, Xiaoge and Hu, Chao
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Nemani et al. propose a strategy focusing on the spectral-normalized neural Gaussian process (SNGP) for deterministic uncertainty quantification.

HSSTT.title: A Bayesian deep learning framework for RUL prediction incorporating uncertainty quantification and calibration
HSSTT.author: Lin, Yanhui and Li, Ganghui
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Lin and Li introduce a Bayesian neural networks (BNN) framework utilizing Concrete Dropout for RUL prediction, in which an iterative calibration is integrated by combining isotonic regression with standard deviation (STD) scaling.

HSSTT.title: Early prediction of knee point and knee capacity for fast-charging lithium-ion battery with uncertainty quantification and calibration
HSSTT.author: Ke, Yuqi and Jiang, Yiyue and Zhu, Rong and Peng, Weiwen and Tan, Xiaojun
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Ke et al. develop a MCD-based BNN model for LIBs' knee capacity prediction and also used the STD scaling method for uncertainty calibration.

HSSTT.title: State of health estimation for second-life lithium-ion batteries in energy storage system with partial charging-discharging workloads
HSSTT.author: Yiyue Jiang and Yuqi Ke and Fangfang Yang and Jinchen Ji and Weiwen Peng
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Jiang et al. present a neural network based on Bayes-by-Backprop strategy with uncertainty calibration to estimate SOH of second-life batteries.

HSSTT.title: Bayesian filtering: From Kalman filters to particle filters, and beyond
HSSTT.author: Chen, Zhe
HSSTT.description_in_paper: The employed filters—predominantly Kalman filters and particle filters—leverage inherent Bayesian frameworks to quantify uncertainty through probabilistic inference over system states and noise distributions, enabling dynamic confidence bounds on predictive results.

HSSTT.title: A review of uncertainty quantification in deep learning: Techniques, applications and challenges
HSSTT.author: Moloud Abdar and Farhad Pourpanah and Sadiq Hussain and Dana Rezazadegan and Li Liu and Mohammad Ghavamzadeh and Paul Fieguth and Xiaochun Cao and Abbas Khosravi and U. Rajendra Acharya and Vladimir Makarenkov and Saeid Nahavandi
HSSTT.description_in_paper: Uncertainty-aware data-driven prognostic models can be classified into statistical learning-based methods and deep learning-based methods. Deep learning methods address uncertainty by leveraging the statistical properties of randomized parameter spaces or output distributions.

RODTNet.title: Lithium-ion battery capacity estimation — A pruned convolutional neural network approach assisted with transfer learning
RODTNet.author: Yihuan Li and Kang Li and Xuan Liu and Yanxia Wang and Li Zhang
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Li et al. propose a lightweight and generalizable model for battery SOH estimation that integrates the pretraining-finetuning paradigm with pruned convolutional neural network.

RODTNet.title: Estimating State of Charge for xEV Batteries Using 1D Convolutional Neural Networks and Transfer Learning
RODTNet.author: Bhattacharjee, Arnab and Verma, Ashu and Mishra, Sukumar and Saha, Tapan K.
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Bhattacharjee et al. utilize finetune 1D CNN to facilitate state estimation for varying battery chemistries.

RODTNet.title: Predictive Battery Health Management With Transfer Learning and Online Model Correction
RODTNet.author: Che, Yunhong and Deng, Zhongwei and Lin, Xianke and Hu, Lin and Hu, Xiaosong
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Che et al. introduce an online self-calibrating model for RUL prediction based on Gaussian process regression, long short-term memory neural network, and a pretraining-finetuning strategy.

RODTNet.title: Battery state of health estimation using a novel BiLSTM-Mamba2 network with differential voltage features and transfer learning
RODTNet.author: Yunong Liu and Yuefeng Liu and Hongyu Shen and Liuxu Ding
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Liu et al. fine-tune a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM)-Mamba2 model based on differential voltage features to achieve SOH estimation across batteries with different operating conditions and electrode materials.

RODTNet.title: Real-time personalized health status prediction of lithium-ion batteries using deep transfer learning
RODTNet.author: Ma, Guijun and Xu, Songpei and Jiang, Benben and Cheng, Cheng and Yang, Xin and Shen, Yue and Yang, Tao and Huang, Yunhui and Ding, Han and Yuan, Ye
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Ma et al. propose a real-time personalized battery degradation modeling framework named CRNN, based on convolutional-recurrent neural network, achieving joint prediction of SOH and RUL across operating conditions.

RODTNet.title: Physics-informed neural network for lithium-ion battery degradation stable modeling and prognosis
RODTNet.author: Wang, Fujin and Zhai, Zhi and Zhao, Zhibin and Di, Yi and Chen, Xuefeng
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Wang et al. propose a physics-informed neural network (PINN) for battery degradation modeling and achieve cross-dataset battery health state prediction using the pretraining-finetuning paradigm.

RODTNet.title: Robust State of Health Estimation for Heterogeneous Batteries With Privacy Preserving
RODTNet.author: Wang, Tianjing and Zhang, Zhijun and Tao, Yuechuan and Dong, Zhao Yang
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Wang et al. propose a decentralized framework to achieve robust SOH estimation across heterogeneous battery datasets.

RODTNet.title: A Transfer Learning-Based Method for Personalized State of Health Estimation of Lithium-Ion Batteries
RODTNet.author: Ma, Guijun and Xu, Songpei and Yang, Tao and Du, Zhenbang and Zhu, Limin and Ding, Han and Yuan, Ye
RODTNet.journal: IEEE Trans. Neural Netw. Learn. Syst.
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Ma et al. propose a method named ConvMMD that aligns source and target domains by minimizing the maximum mean discrepancy of lower-order moments between them, facilitating a condition-robust estimation of SOH of batteries.

RODTNet.title: End-to-end capacity estimation of Lithium-ion batteries with an enhanced long short-term memory network considering domain adaptation
RODTNet.author: Te Han and Zhe Wang and Huixing Meng
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Han et al. present a high-precision degradation model requiring only a few target domain samples, achieved by incorporating a domain adaptation layer into long short-term memory neural networks, known as LSTM-DA.

RODTNet.title: State-of-Health Estimation for Lithium-Ion Batteries Using Domain Adversarial Transfer Learning
RODTNet.author: Ye, Zhuang and Yu, Jianbo
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Ye et al. design a method named DDAN that realizes unsupervised degradation feature alignment via adversarial training across source and target domains, enabling a transferable prognostic model.

RODTNet.title: State of Health Estimation of Lithium Iron Phosphate Batteries Based on Degradation Knowledge Transfer Learning
RODTNet.author: Lu, Xin and Qiu, Jing and Lei, Gang and Zhu, Jianguo
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Lu et al. develop a two-stage prognostic framework named DKTL, which combines degradation mechanisms and achieves knowledge transfer of degradation patterns from synthetic data to real data.

RODTNet.title: Feature disentanglement and tendency retainment with domain adaptation for Lithium-ion battery capacity estimation
RODTNet.author: Fujin Wang and Zhibin Zhao and Zhi Zhai and Yanjie Guo and Huan Xi and Shibin Wang and Xuefeng Chen
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Wang et al. develop a dual-branch model with a domain invariant-specific feature decoupling strategy and a degradation trend preservation strategy to align degradation patterns across domains, known as DR-Net.

RODTNet.title: Generalizing to Unseen Domains: A Survey on Domain Generalization
RODTNet.author: Wang, Jindong and Lan, Cuiling and Liu, Chang and Ouyang, Yidong and Qin, Tao and Lu, Wang and Chen, Yiqiang and Zeng, Wenjun and Yu, Philip S.
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Domain generalization paradigm involves three main categories, namely data manipulation, representation learning, and specific learning strategy.

RODTNet.title: Domain generalization-based state-of-health estimation of lithium-ion batteries
RODTNet.author: Liping Chen and Xinyuan Bao and António M. Lopes and Xin Li and Huifang Kong and Yi Chai and Penghua Li
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Chen et al. develop a dual-branch feature extractor to process domain samples with mixed and separated sources. By leveraging a domain discriminator and a health state estimator, their approach enables domain-invariant degradation feature extraction, culminating in a representation learning-based degradation pattern generalization method termed DGSOH.

RODTNet.title: Forecasting battery degradation trajectory under domain shift with domain generalization
RODTNet.author: Ruifeng Tan and Xibin Lu and Minhao Cheng and Jia Li and Jiaqiang Huang and Tongyi Zhang
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Tan et al. design a meta learning-based domain generalization method named MAGNet. It couples a two-phase meta-optimization strategy (training/testing cycles) with RUL-driven health prediction, enforcing domain-invariant representation learning through task-aligned gradient synchronization.

RODTNet.title: iTransformer: Inverted Transformers Are Effective for Time Series Forecasting
RODTNet.author: Yong Liu and Tengge Hu and Haoran Zhang and Haixu Wu and Shiyu Wang and Lintao Ma and Mingsheng Long
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Liu et al. propose a method designed to obtain robust sequence representations against OOD temporal patterns through the inclusion of a transposed attention module and a feed-forward network module, known as iTransformer.

RODTNet.title: A Time Series is Worth 64 Words: Long-term Forecasting with Transformers
RODTNet.author: Yuqi Nie and Nam H Nguyen and Phanwadee Sinthong and Jayant Kalagnanam
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Nie et al. present a time-series modeling framework resistant to pattern drift known as PatchTST. The model employs subsequence segmentation and channel-independent modeling to enhance its adaptability to dynamic temporal patterns.

RODTNet.title: TSMixer: An All-MLP Architecture for Time Series Forecasting
RODTNet.author: Sian Chen and Chunliang Li and Sercan O Arik and Nathanael Christian Yoder and Tomas Pfister
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Chen et al. develop a purely linear model capable of efficiently extracting spatio-temporal dependencies without relying on task-specific prior knowledge, known as TSMixer.

RODTNet.title: Advancing Electric Vehicle Battery Management: A Data-Driven Digital Twin Approach for Real-Time Monitoring and Performance Enhancement
RODTNet.author: Alamin, Khaled Sidahmed Sidahmed and Chen, Yukai and Macii, Enrico and Poncino, Massimo and Vinco, Sara
RODTNet.description_in_paper: Alamin et al. propose a digital twin framework to realize effective cloud-vehicle generalization for BMS.

DA-TMLLM.title: BearLLM: A Prior Knowledge-Enhanced Bearing Health Management Framework with Unified Vibration Signal Representation
DA-TMLLM.author: Peng, Haotian and Liu, Jiawei and Du, Jinsong and Gao, Jie and Wang, Wei
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: H. Peng et al. design a cross-dataset diagnostic LLM, termed BearLLM.

DA-TMLLM.title: Generating HSR Bogie Vibration Signals via Pulse Voltage-Guided Conditional Diffusion Model
DA-TMLLM.author: Liu, Xuan and Chen, Jinglong and Xie, Jingsong and Chang, Yuanhong
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: X. Liu et al. introduce pulse-voltage embeddings into the diffusion process for controllable vibration synthesis.

DA-TMLLM.title: Deep convolutional generative adversarial network with semi-supervised learning enabled physics elucidation for extended gear fault diagnosis under data limitations
DA-TMLLM.author: Kai Zhou and Edward Diehl and Jiong Tang
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: K. Zhou et al. develop a balanced generator-discriminator architecture to diagnose gear defects, termed DCGAN.

DA-TMLLM.title: A Hybrid Generalization Network for Intelligent Fault Diagnosis of Rotating Machinery under Unseen Working Conditions
DA-TMLLM.author: Han, Te and Li, Yan-Fu and Qian, Min
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: T. Han et al. propose a hybrid network that combines class constraints with adversarial domain regularization to capture transferable features.

DA-TMLLM.title: Few-Shot Bearing Fault Diagnosis Via Ensembling Transformer-Based Model With Mahalanobis Distance Metric Learning From Multiscale Features
DA-TMLLM.author: Vu, Manh-Hung and Nguyen, Van-Quang and Tran, Thi-Thao and Pham, Van-Truong and Lo, Men-Tzung
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: M. Vu et al. propose a dual-branch diagnostic framework that enhances fault classification accuracy in sparse-label scenarios.

DA-TMLLM.title: QSCGAN: An Un-Supervised Quick Self-Attention Convolutional GAN for LRE Bearing Fault Diagnosis Under Limited Label-Lacked Data
DA-TMLLM.author: Wan, Wenqing and He, Shuilong and Chen, Jinglong and Li, Aimin and Feng, Yong
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: W. Wan et al. embed self-attention and spectral normalization within generator-discriminator architectures to augment rocket bearing data, termed QSCGAN.

DA-TMLLM.title: A generalized network with domain invariance and specificity representation for bearing remaining useful life prediction under unknown conditions
DA-TMLLM.author: Qing Zheng and Pengtao Teng and Kai Zhang and Guofu Ding and Xuwei Lai and Zhixuan Li and Zhaocheng Yuan
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: Q. Zheng et al. combine degradation stage partitioning and vector quantized augmentation to enrich degradation features, termed VQVAE.

DA-TMLLM.title: Adaptive open set domain generalization network: Learning to diagnose unknown faults under unknown working conditions
DA-TMLLM.author: Chao Zhao and Weiming Shen
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: C. Zhao et al. employ a triplet loss and a boundary adaptation method to learn compact features and optimal class boundaries.

DA-TMLLM.title: Domain Adaptation With Multi-Adversarial Learning for Open-Set Cross-Domain Intelligent Bearing Fault Diagnosis
DA-TMLLM.author: Zhu, Zhixiao and Chen, Guangyi and Tang, Gang
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: Z. Zhu et al. develop an adversarially trained open-set classifier to identify unknown classes and out-of-domain samples.

DA-TMLLM.title: A Customized Meta-Learning Framework for Diagnosing New Faults From Unseen Working Conditions With Few Labeled Data
DA-TMLLM.author: Long, Jianyu and Zhang, Rongxin and Chen, Yibin and Zhao, Rong and Yang, Zhe and Huang, Yunwei and Li, Chuan
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: J. Long et al. develop a domain-generalized unseen fault diagnosis method by fusing a meta-learning block with the Mahalanobis metric, termed MLMM.

DA-TMLLM.title: Weighted domain separation based open set fault diagnosis
DA-TMLLM.author: Xingwu Zhang and Yu Zhao and Xiaolei Yu and Rui Ma and Chenxi Wang and Xuefeng Chen
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: X. Zhang et al. introduce a domain-adaptive approach that disentangles private and shared features to diagnose unseen faults, termed WDSN.

DA-TMLLM.title: A Novel Multidomain Contrastive-Coding-Based Open-Set Domain Generalization Framework for Machinery Fault Diagnosis
DA-TMLLM.author: Lu, Biliang and Zhang, Yingjie and Sun, Qingshuai and Li, Ming and Li, Pude
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: B. Lu et al. design a contrastive embedding-based diagnostic strategy that jointly preserves domain-specific and domain-invariant features, termed MDCC.

DA-TMLLM.title: How Good Are LLMs at Out-of-Distribution Detection?
DA-TMLLM.author: Liu, Bo and Zhan, Li-Ming and Lu, Zexin and Feng, Yujie and Xue, Lei and Wu, Xiao-Ming
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: B. Liu et al. benchmark LLaMA-series LLMs for undesired input detection and design a cosine distance-based detector using isotropic embeddings, termed LLM-OOD.

DA-TMLLM.title: LLM-Check: Investigating Detection of Hallucinations in Large Language Models
DA-TMLLM.author: Sriramanan, Gaurang and Bharti, Siddhant and Sadasivan, Vinu Sankar and Saha, Shoumik and Kattakinda, Priyatham and Feizi, Soheil
DA-TMLLM.booktitle: Proc. Adv. Neural Inf. Process. Syst.
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: G. Sriramanan et al. design a compute-efficient detector that leverages the model's internal attention maps, termed LLM-Check.

DA-TMLLM.title: Shifting Attention to Relevance: Towards the Predictive Uncertainty Quantification of Free-Form Large Language Models
DA-TMLLM.author: Duan, Jinhao and Cheng, Hao and Wang, Shiqi and Zavalny, Alex and Wang, Chenan and Xu, Renjing and Kailkhura, Bhavya and Xu, Kaidi
DA-TMLLM.booktitle: Proc. Annu. Meet. Assoc. Comput. Linguist.
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: J. Duan et al. develop a hallucination quantification approach by reweighting token- and sequence-level relevance.

DA-TMLLM.title: Enhancing Uncertainty-Based Hallucination Detection with Stronger Focus
DA-TMLLM.author: Zhang, Tianhang and Qiu, Lin and Guo, Qipeng and Deng, Cheng and Zhang, Yue and Zhang, Zheng and Zhou, Chenghu and Wang, Xinbing and Fu, Luoyi
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: T. Zhang et al. introduce a retrieval-free detector that quantifies hallucinations through token-level uncertainty.

DA-TMLLM.title: SelfCheckGPT: Zero-Resource Black-Box Hallucination Detection for Generative Large Language Models
DA-TMLLM.author: Manakul, Potsawee and Liusie, Adian and Gales, Mark
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: P. Manakul et al. propose SelfCheckGPT, which assesses hallucinations by sampling multiple black-box LLM responses and measuring their mutual consistency.

DA-TMLLM.title: Unsupervised Real-Time Hallucination Detection based on the Internal States of Large Language Models
DA-TMLLM.author: Su, Weihang and Wang, Changyue and Ai, Qingyao and Hu, Yiran and Wu, Zhijing and Zhou, Yujia and Liu, Yiqun
DA-TMLLM.booktitle: Proc. Annu. Meet. Assoc. Comput. Linguist.
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: W. Su et al. propose a real-time and annotation-free hallucination detection framework using the internal states of LLMs, termed MIND.

DA-TMLLM.title: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Model Generation: A Token Probability Approach
DA-TMLLM.author: Quevedo, Ernesto and Salazar, Jorge Yero and Koerner, Rachel and Rivas, Pablo and Cerny, Tomas
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: E. Quevedo et al. propose a supervised approach that utilizes an auxiliary detector trained on resource-efficient numerical features, termed SHalluDetect.

DA-TMLLM.title: HaluEval: A Large-Scale Hallucination Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Models
DA-TMLLM.author: Li, Junyi and Cheng, Xiaoxue and Zhao, Xin and Nie, Jian-Yun and Wen, Ji-Rong
DA-TMLLM.description_in_paper: J. Li et al. develop a benchmark via sampling-then-filtering and annotation for hallucination analysis.
